name: Teep
description: Beta extension for tipping creators on X with test funds on Arc testnet. Test funds have no real-world value.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://auth.privy.io https://*.privy.io https://*.privy.systems wss://*.privy.systems https://explorer-api.walletconnect.com https://*.zerodev.app https://*.pimlico.io https://api.getteep.xyz https://rpc.testnet.arc.network wss://rpc.testnet.arc.network http://localhost:3001 http://127.0.0.1:3001;
